scenarios.description: parse(".1.2.3") catches parsing error for leading dot and returns null (invalid format branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return null due to invalid leading dot
pseudocode: TEST TC13 parse invalid leading dot

scenarios.description: parse("1.2.3-alpha+build.meta.1") returns Semver instance with complex pre-release and build tokens (valid complex branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return non-null Semver with preRelease ["alpha"] and build ["build","meta","1"]
pseudocode: TEST TC14 parse complex pre-release and build

scenarios.description: parse("1.2.3+build_1") catches parse error for invalid build identifier character and returns null (invalid-build branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return null due to underscore in build identifier
pseudocode: TEST TC15 parse invalid build identifier
